name: Field Boundary Inspection Mission
description: You are an Agricultural Technician at a cooperative planning a drone boundary-inspection flight for storm damage. Create a mission plan that fulfills all requirements—including takeoff, waypoints, loiter commands, speed changes, and RTL—as specified in the operations brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ops_brief.txt. Save the completed mission to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/boundary_inspection.plan.
